ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Total number of listings managed by the host */,
  "host_since" TEXT /* Date when the host joined the platform */,
  "host_response_time" TEXT /* Average response time of the host to inquiries */,
  "host_verifications" TEXT /* Verifications completed by the host (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "host_location" TEXT /* Location of the host */,
  "host_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the host */,
  "host_about" TEXT /* Brief description of the host */,
  "host_languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the host */,
  "host_response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the host to inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the rental listing */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host of the listing */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Group representing the broader neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Specific neighborhood of the listing */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the listing location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the listing location */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room being rented (e.g., Private room) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per night for the listing */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews per month */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Number of listings managed by the host */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days the listing is available for booking in a year */,
  "listing_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  "listing_house_rules" TEXT /* House rules for the listing */,
  "listing_images" TEXT /* Images of the listing */,
  "listing_video" TEXT /* Video of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_neighbourhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_types" (
  "listing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing type */,
  "listing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the listing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_amenity_bridge" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id", "amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the neighborhood belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the guest (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Full name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "profile_created" TEXT /* Date when the guest created their profile */,
  "guest_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the guest */,
  "guest_about" TEXT /* Brief description of the guest */,
  "guest_languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "booking_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_booking_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_status_id") REFERENCES booking_status ("booking_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_status" (
  "booking_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking status */,
  "booking_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the booking status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being checked for availability */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for checking availability */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Availability status of the listing on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_history" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing for which the price is recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the listing */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date when the price was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing related to the message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender (host or guest) */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver (host or guest) */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text content of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id")
)
